description: Final polish pass: ensure all interactive elements have proper hover/focus/active states, verify loading states use skeleton patterns, confirm imagery guidance (saturated color only in product images/banners, not structural UI), and add any missing state styles. Fix any remaining globals.css utility classes to use the new token system.
steps: Audit all button/link/interactive elements in customer-facing components for missing hover/focus/active states. The button.tsx CVA already handles this well. Check: header.tsx action buttons, mobile-bottom-nav.tsx tabs, product-card.tsx add button, cart-page-client.tsx stepper buttons, checkout-form.tsx inputs/buttons. Add hover:bg-neutral-100 / focus-visible:ring-2 ring-primary / active:scale-[0.98] where missing.

Verify loading states: Check app/loading.tsx, app/account/loading.tsx, app/admin/loading.tsx, components/ui/skeleton-loader.tsx, components/ui/product-skeleton-grid.tsx all use consistent skeleton patterns with neutral-100/neutral-200 pulsing. No blank flash should occur.

Update globals.css utility classes to use the new token system: .floating-cart-bar bg should reference primary/brand color. .show-all-pill bg should reference primary. .btn-gradient-green gradient should use primary-900 to primary-700. .section-title font-size should reference the display token size. .ios-squircle-card shadow should use brand-tinted approach.

Imagery/color check: Confirm that structural UI elements (nav, header, cards, buttons) use only neutral + primary + secondary (for CTAs). Saturated colors (orange-500, pink-500, etc.) should only appear in product category backgrounds (categoryColors in page.tsx) and promotional banners - not in structural chrome. The categoryColors (bg-orange-50, bg-green-50, etc.) are acceptable as they are for product context, not structural UI.

Final gradient audit: Check all gradient backgrounds for loud multi-color combos. The login-form.tsx uses a dark gradient (fine). Admin panels use green gradients for branding (acceptable). Ensure no rainbow or clashing gradients exist in customer pages.
acceptance_criteria: All interactive elements in customer-facing components have hover, focus-visible, and active states
Loading skeleton components use consistent neutral-100/neutral-200 colors
globals.css utility classes reference design tokens instead of hardcoded values
No structural UI elements use saturated decorative colors (only neutral/primary/secondary)
